metaDescription: Kimi K2.6 (Moonshot AI (Kimi)), released 2026-04-20 — part of the Kimi K2 line. Natively multimodal flagship adding video input; expands Agent Swarm to 300 sub…
overview: Kimi K2.6 is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi K2 line. Released 2026-04-20. Moonshot's flagship open-weight 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model line (32B active) for agentic chat and coding.
What's notable in this version: Natively multimodal flagship adding video input; expands Agent Swarm to 300 sub-agents. 1T MoE / 32B active, 256K context, open weights.
